com.hp.workpath.api.accessory

Class AccessoryInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.AccessoryInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    HIDAccessoryInfo

    public abstract class AccessoryInfo
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    AccessoryInfo class is a container for accessory details. The class provides following methods

    • getAccessoryClass
    • getRegistrationType
    • getDetails

    Since:
    API 3

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  AccessoryInfo.AccessoryClass
      A collection of the AccessoryClass.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AccessoryInfo()
      Default Constructor

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      abstract AccessoryInfo.AccessoryClass getAccessoryClass()
      Retrieve the supported accessory class by the device.
      <T extends AccessoryInfo>
      T      		 getDetails()
      Retrieve accessory details specific to accessory class.
      abstract RegistrationType getRegistrationType()
      Retrieve the supported accessory registration type by the device.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AccessoryInfo

        public AccessoryInfo()

        Default Constructor

        Since:
        API 3

    • Method Detail

      • getAccessoryClass

        public abstract AccessoryInfo.AccessoryClass getAccessoryClass()

        Retrieve the supported accessory class by the device.

        Returns:

        Supported AccessoryInfo.AccessoryClass.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and should be either any of the values in AccessoryInfo.AccessoryClass.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getRegistrationType

        public abstract RegistrationType getRegistrationType()

        Retrieve the supported accessory registration type by the device.

        Returns:

        Supported RegistrationType.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and should be either any of the values in RegistrationType.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getDetails

        public <T extends AccessoryInfo> T getDetails()

        Retrieve accessory details specific to accessory class.

        Returns:
        accessory details
        Since:
        API 3
